name: Grecian Chicken
method: Heat two teaspoons of oil over the moderate flame in a wide skillet.
Add the chicken; sauté for ten minutes until it is no longer pink.
Remove it and keep it hot.
Heat and cook oil in the same pan; add the remaining ingredients.
For 2-3 minutes, continue cooking until the onion is transparent.

Reduce heat; boil, exposed, 3-4 minutes until the vegetables are
Set the chicken back in the skillet; add the olives.

thoroughly. Present with orzo if needed.
